name: Ancient the Dimensions
short_description: Immerse yourself in an epic Survival Action RPG adventure, exploring a vast fantasy fairy tale world to build your own sanctuary and survive against extraordinary mythical creatures. Enhance your equipment, weapons, and skills to battle ruthless empires and interdimensional visitors.
detailed_description:
Experience an Survival ARPG-Style Adventure, Base-defense, Build, Craft, Explore, and Fight your way through legendary creatures and ancient visitors from other dimensions.

Awake with Nothing, Now You Control Your Destiny

You must survive in this fantasy fairy tale world, facing ancient visitors, radical empires, and massive legendary creatures for as long as you can.

Open World Fantasy

Explore a world filled with both wild animals and massive mythical creatures alongside ruthless empires. Danger lurks everywhere. You must survive in this fairy tale world and create your own legend here.

Survival & Hunger & Farm

You will feel hunger and thirst if you don't eat for a long time, which may negatively affect your status. But don't worry! You can find food by hunting wild animals or foraging for fruits. Ideally, you can grow crops and farm your own food as well. However, not everything is edible, so be cautious. Alternatively, you can gather ingredients to cook your own meals. Try not to let your stomach go empty because hunger can be frightening.

Encountering the Enemy

Starting with nothing but a piece of cloth to survive in this world, you will have to face enemies including wild animals, empires, bandits, and both small strange creatures and massive legendary beasts, or ancient visitors from other dimensions. To upgrade your equipment and weapons, you must fight and survive in this fantasy fairy tale world !!

Equipments & Weapons

You can craft equipment and weapons at the crafting table or buy them from village shops. Additionally, you can gather materials to upgrade your equipment, weapons, and accessories from legendary creatures, empire bosses, or bandit leaders.

Craft & Building

You can build your own medieval-style residence. However, you should avoid constructing it near strange creatures, as they might damage your home. It's best to find a safe location to ensure your residence remains undisturbed

Companions NPC

You can hire Companion NPCs to travel and fight alongside you. So that they can watch your back and keep you safe anytime.However, it's crucial not to lose the Companion Scroll, as it's very expensive. Please be careful.

Skill & Ability

Learn Unique Skills: Passive and Active Abilities Discover different unique skills, both passive and active, that give you distinct advantages. For example, you can inflict wide-range damage or increase lifesteal and attack speed for a short duration. Then, simply manage your arsenal or avoid damage from those enemies.
